name: donchian_trend_pullback_ger40_m15
hypothesis: GER40 M15 during EU cash session trends persistently when ADX>22. Entering on a shallow EMA20 pullback inside an established Donchian(40) breakout direction captures the continuation leg with better R than chasing breakouts.

rules: trend_up = close made new Donchian(40) high within last 20 bars AND ema20 > ema50
LONG: trend_up AND price pulls back to within 0.3*ATR14 of ema20 AND RSI(14) between 40 and 60 AND bullish close (close > open, close > prior high)
no entry within 2 bars of Donchian breakout bar (avoid chase)

exit.sl: swing low/high of last 5 bars, minimum 1.0*ATR14 from entry
exit.time_stop: close after 30 M15 bars or at 20:00 UTC
